description: AUDIT LOGGER: Records every tool call (tool name, inputs summary, timestamp, session) to a local audit log file. Useful for compliance, debugging, and tracking all DB operations made by agents.

preToolUse.description: Log tool invocation BEFORE it runs
preToolUse.powershell:
param($input)
$payload = $input | ConvertFrom-Json
$logDir = Join-Path $payload.cwd 'logs'
if (-not (Test-Path $logDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $logDir | Out-Null }
$logFile = Join-Path $logDir 'agent-audit.log'
$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
$toolName = $payload.tool_name
$sessionId = $payload.session_id
# Summarize tool input (truncate long SQL)
$inputJson = $payload.tool_input | ConvertTo-Json -Compress
if ($inputJson.Length -gt 300) { $inputJson = $inputJson.Substring(0, 300) + '...[truncated]' }
$logEntry = "[$timestamp] PRE  | session=$sessionId | tool=$toolName | input=$inputJson"
Add-Content -Path $logFile -Value $logEntry
exit 0
preToolUse.bash:
#!/bin/bash
payload=$(cat)
cwd=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('cwd',''))")
tool=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_name',''))")
session=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('session_id',''))")
mkdir -p "$cwd/logs"
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] PRE  | session=$session | tool=$tool" >> "$cwd/logs/agent-audit.log"
exit 0

postToolUse.description: Log tool result AFTER it completes
postToolUse.powershell:
param($input)
$payload = $input | ConvertFrom-Json
$logDir = Join-Path $payload.cwd 'logs'
if (-not (Test-Path $logDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $logDir | Out-Null }
$logFile = Join-Path $logDir 'agent-audit.log'
$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
$toolName = $payload.tool_name
$sessionId = $payload.session_id
$success = if ($payload.tool_result.isError) { 'ERROR' } else { 'OK' }
$logEntry = "[$timestamp] POST | session=$sessionId | tool=$toolName | result=$success"
Add-Content -Path $logFile -Value $logEntry
exit 0
postToolUse.bash:
#!/bin/bash
payload=$(cat)
cwd=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('cwd',''))")
tool=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_name',''))")
session=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('session_id',''))")
mkdir -p "$cwd/logs"
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] POST | session=$session | tool=$tool | result=DONE" >> "$cwd/logs/agent-audit.log"
exit 0
